minecraftProfilePage.title: Minecraft profile
minecraftProfilePage.description: Inspect one player profile, its ownership, bound textures, and launcher-visible assets.
minecraftProfilePage.renameDescription: The profile UUID and texture bindings stay unchanged. Selected launcher tokens must refresh before they can be used again.
minecraftProfilePage.textureListDescription: Launcher-visible skin and cape records currently attached to this profile.
minecraftProfilePage.noTextures: No textures are bound to this profile.
minecraftProfilePage.deleteDescription: This removes profile texture bindings, deletes unreferenced texture objects, and revokes launcher tokens selected for this profile.
minecraftProfilePage.deleteTextureDescription: The {{textureType}} binding will be removed from this profile. Unreferenced texture data may be cleaned up.

configPage.title: System Config
configPage.description: Review and adjust runtime settings stored in system_config.
configPage.editorDescription: Values accept plain text, JSON strings, or line-based string arrays.

auditPage.title: Audit
auditPage.description: Search security and administrative events without exposing raw API tooling.
auditPage.emptyDescription: The server has not written any audit events yet.
auditPage.filteredEmptyDescription: Try a different action or entity type filter.

tasksPage.title: Background Tasks
tasksPage.description: Inspect background work, retry failed jobs, and clean old completed records.
tasksPage.filtersDescription: Cleanup requires an explicit finished-before timestamp.
tasksPage.creator: Creator

aboutPage.title: About AsterYggdrasil
aboutPage.description: Inspect the current instance version, build, and project resources.
aboutPage.tagline: Self-hosted Minecraft skin site and Yggdrasil authentication server
aboutPage.summary: AsterYggdrasil handles site accounts, Minecraft profiles, texture management, and launcher authentication in one operations-focused panel.
aboutPage.metadataNote: Version and build time come from the admin API so operators can confirm which server instance this panel is connected to.
aboutPage.resourcesDescription: Open the source, README, or license for implementation and deployment context.
aboutPage.capabilitiesDescription: This page identifies the instance; configuration and data operations stay in their own admin pages.
aboutPage.capabilityAuthDesc: Handles launcher login, token lifecycle, join, and hasJoined checks.
aboutPage.capabilityProfilesDesc: Maintains Minecraft UUIDs, profile names, and account bindings.
aboutPage.capabilityTexturesDesc: Manages skins, capes, and launcher-readable texture metadata.
aboutPage.capabilityOperationsDesc: Provides audit logs, background tasks, external auth, and runtime config infrastructure.
